title: 高速回転ファンタジー

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You're referencing medieval clothing for your
doll? That does explain your inviting me to this
cafe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to get myself in the fantasy mindset.
You see, I'm planning to make a high-fantasy
maid outfit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
May I ask you to provide me with some relevant
background information from the era?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to! First, could you tell me more about
this maid character? How big is the manor she
works at? What's her rank? Is she of a fantasy
race?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Fantasy has all kinds of people, after all—like
elves and dwarfs!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Also, "medieval" is a rather broad expression, so
let's hone in on Europe in the Middle Ages. It's
the integration of realism that really gives
creative projects a sense of depth—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! There I go again, rambling on...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That was too much, wasn't it? Okay, I'll go over
those points again, one at a time—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's quite all right. You wish to know the living
conditions, social status, and race—is that
correct?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well... She's a ghost who works as a regular live-in
maid at a haunted mansion...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...At least, that's what I have in mind. But I
wonder if that's too little for you to go on?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Not at all, that's plenty. Actually, I'm stunned you
managed to pick up on all the main points while I
was babbling away...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, Bright, you're sharp as a tack and
precise beyond compare!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I bet that's how you're able to seize every
opening that presents itself during races, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. In that case, one could say that
conversations like this constitute a type of
training, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your instruction, Trainer Rob
Roy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even while remaining nonchalant, Mejiro Bright
continues honing her talents by discerning the
key points of Zenno Rob Roy's verbose
explanations!
